title: AL Gutter Solutions: your water transportation solution
description: BUSINESS NEWS - If leaking gutters are...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - If leaking gutters are giving you a headache, call AL Gutter Solutions. Managing director Alexis Sauer understands all about Georgians' struggle with quality service - and she is passionate about giving only top service.


> AL Gutter solutions do gutter installations, maintenance and repair work, and also install water tanks and pumps. They also do sewer and storm water jetting.


"No job is too small or too big for us and we operate anywhere in the Southern Cape," says Sauer. "Whether it's at your house or on a remote dairy farm, anything that transports water and gets blocked, we can clean."

AL Gutter Solutions is a new business, having opened in May this year, but it carries the quality guarantee that comes with the Sauer surname. Alexis is the third generation of Sauers carrying on the work of her father and grandfather, who have been in plumbing in George for the past 50 years.

Quotations to install new gutters are free and Alexis says they strive to complete the work as fast as possible. "When I call for a service I expect it to happen immediately and that is what we are trying to deliver at AL Gutter Solutions," she says.

Alexis advises that gutters should be cleaned at least once a year. "You can do it yourself, but cleaning gutters takes elbow grease and we have the experience and equipment to do it. And our prices are competitive."

Contact them on +27 83 268 0955 or [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
